productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Printed White T-shirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton,is sleeveless with broad shoulders and has graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Use warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery Slip into absolute comfort with this white printed T-shirt from flying machine and hit the dance floor in style. Created using soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt looks great with denim trousers or skirts, or try it with shorts and kitten-heel sandals.
